query: SELECT label_fr, value, COUNT(*) as count FROM metrics GROUP BY label_fr, value HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 88yLpdrkBbhoMQ3.root --database HJdMFahbvq3VamEnwkCWwG --execute SELECT label_fr, value, COUNT(*) as count FROM metrics GROUP BY label_fr, value HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
